ab_evaluation.stdout:
======================================================================
🔧 Registering Additional Tools (DeepAgent provides core file ops)
======================================================================

📁 DeepAgent FilesystemMiddleware provides:
  ℹ️  ls, read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep
  ℹ️  (No execute - use python_run or shell_run instead)

🧠 项目记忆与用户上下文（deep_agent 提供，非 MemoryMiddleware）：
  ℹ️  project_memory: _load_memory_content(.context/CONTEXT.md, .context/rules/*.md)
  ℹ️  inject_user_context: @dynamic_prompt 从 config.configurable 注入

⚙️  Code Execution Tools (enhanced):
  ✅ python_run - Execute Python code (with auto-imports)
  ✅ python_internal - Fast internal execution (Cursor-style)
  ✅ shell_run - Execute shell commands (git, npm, pip, etc.)

🧠 Thinking Tools (Claude-style):
  ✅ think_tool - Step-by-step reasoning
  ✅ ask_user - Ask user and wait for response
  ✅ critic_review - Structured evidence/calculation review

📚 Batch File Operations (efficiency):
  ✅ batch_read_files - Read multiple files in one call

🌐 Web Tools (search + fetch):
  ✅ duckduckgo backend available
  ✅ web_fetch - Fetch webpage content (WebBaseLoader)
  ℹ️  tavily backend disabled (set TAVILY_API_KEY)
  ✅ web_search - Unified web search (Tavily first, DDG fallback)

🧠 Memory Tools (langmem - semantic search):
  ✅ manage_memory - Create, update, or delete a memory to persist acro...
  ✅ search_memory - Search your long-term memories for information rel...
  ✅ manage_memory_with_category - 按分类管理记忆（基于 langmem manage_memory 封装）。

           ...
  ✅ search_memory_by_category - 按分类检索记忆（基于 langmem search_memory 封装）。

           ...

📚 Learning Tools (Experience Retrieval):
  ✅ search_learning_experience - Retrieve historical learning

🔍 Unified Retrieval (Knowledge + Memory + Ontology):
✅ 资源配置已加载: /Users/workspace/DevelopProjects/ccb-v0.378/knowledge_base/resources.json
  ✅ search_knowledge - Unified retrieval (向量库懒加载)

🗺️  Ontology Tools:
  ✅ ontology backends available (use via python_run when needed)

🧠 Knowledge Graph Tools (Reasoning KB Core):
  ✅ extract_entities - Extract entities and relations, build KG
  ✅ query_kg - Query knowledge graph for reasoning context

📊 Failure Recovery Tools:
  ✅ failure recovery backend available (use via python_run)

📚 Self-Learning Tools (KG Dynamic Enhancement):
  ✅ learn_from_doc backend available (use via python_run)
  ✅ report_task_result backend available (use via python_run)
  ✅ get_learning_stats backend available (use via python_run)
  ✅ get_similar_paths backend available (use via python_run)

📊 Chart Generation Tools:
  ✅ create_chart - Generate charts:
      基础: line, bar, pie, scatter, heatmap, gantt
      高级: network(拓扑图), flowchart(流程图), mindmap(思维导图), architecture(架构图)

📖 Skills Tools (list_skills + match_skills + run_skill_script):
  ✅ list_skills - 列出已安装的 Skills（能力）。当前会话已按业务场景加载了能力子集，系统提示词中仅包含该子集的 ...
  ✅ match_skills - 根据任务描述匹配相关能力（Skills）。推荐在任务开始时调用，从已安装能力中找出与本任务最相关的，...
  ✅ run_skill_script - 执行 Skill 中的脚本。

    Use when:
    - Skill 已提供确定性脚本...
  ✅ get_skill_info - 获取 Skill 的详细信息。

    Use when:
    - 已确定候选 Skill，需...

🗺️  DocMap & Workflow: Embedded in prompts (not as tools)

======================================================================

Tools: python_run, python_internal, shell_run, think_tool, ask_user, critic_review, batch_read_files, web_fetch, web_search, manage_memory, search_memory, manage_memory_with_category, search_memory_by_category, search_learning_experience, search_knowledge, extract_entities, query_kg, create_chart, list_skills, match_skills, run_skill_script, get_skill_info
======================================================================
